From November 2017 to January 2018, Central Maine Power monthly data were estimated due to continuous billing issues.
Ownership code Behind the Meter - this group consists of Third Party Owners of rooftop solar systems.
Starting in April 2016, the standard-offer data in Maine are being published with the bundled data.
